topics.label: Play Structure
topics.description: Title, dramatis personae (variables), acts/scenes (labels), and dialogue.

topics.label: Characters as Variables
topics.description: Each character is a variable. Only two can be on stage at once.

topics.label: Noun Phrases as Values
topics.description: Positive nouns = 1, negative = -1. Adjectives double. 'a big big cat' = 4.

topics.label: I/O & Control
topics.description: Open Your Heart (output number), Speak Your Mind (output char). Goto via acts/scenes.
